# agent-loop-guard

> Framework-agnostic agent loop detection — sliding window similarity scoring to catch stuck agents.

- `pip install agent-loop-guard`
- Python >=3.9 | zero dependencies
- Strategies: exact repeat, fuzzy repeat (Jaccard+edit distance), cycle detection, output stagnation
- Actions: CONTINUE → WARN → STOP → ESCALATE (configurable thresholds)
- Exports: `LoopGuard`, `Action`, `ActionConfig`, `Decision`, `ActionRecord`
- Callback adapter: `from loop_guard.integrations.generic import LoopGuardCallback`

```python
from loop_guard import LoopGuard, Action
guard = LoopGuard()
decision = guard.check(tool="search", args={"q": "test"}, output="result")
if decision.action == Action.STOP: ...
```

- [Docs](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/agent-loop-guard) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/agent-loop-guard/) | [Full API](/llms-full.txt)
